name: Diễn đàn Cửa (.NET 8)
postStartCommand: bash -c 'cd /workspaces/forum-cua && ASPNETCORE_URLS=http://0.0.0.0:5080 ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Development setsid dotnet run --project src/Forum.Web/Forum.Web.csproj --no-launch-profile --no-build > /tmp/app.log 2>&1 < /dev/null & disown; echo started'
